item.title: c. 1923 – The George Dauth Children At Idlewild
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Dauth
item.description: The post c. 1923 – The George Dauth Children At Idlewild appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
item.content:encoded:
c. 1923 – The George Dauth Children At Idlewild

Transcription
"Handwritten note by Elizabeth Dauth states: "What a bunch.""

People
Elizabeth Dauth (right)
George Dauth Jr. (left)
Leslie Dauth (middle)

Details
Date: c. 1923
Location: USA, Colorado, Loveland, Idlewild
Source: Dauth Family Archive
Permalink: https://dauthfamily.github.io/photo/c-1923-the-george-dauth-children-at-idlewild/

The post c. 1923 – The George Dauth Children At Idlewild appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.

c. 1909 – Elizabeth Dauth Birthday Party

Transcription
"Handwritten note by Elizabeth Dauth states: "My birthday party""

People
Elizabeth Dauth (front row, 2nd from right)
George Dauth Jr. (front row, 2nd from left)

Details
Date: c. 1909
Location: USA, Colorado, Greeley
Source: Dauth Family Archive

item.title: c. 1909 – Elizabeth and Junior Dauth

item.description: The post c. 1909 – Elizabeth and Junior Dauth appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
item.content:encoded:
c. 1909 – Elizabeth and Junior Dauth
June and Elizabeth Dauth pose for a photo at Elizabeth's Birthday Party

Transcription
"Handwritten note by Elizabeth Dauth states: "My birthday party""

People
Elizabeth Dauth (right)
George Dauth Jr. (left)

Details
Date: c. 1909
Location: USA, Colorado, Greeley
Source: Dauth Family Archive
Permalink: https://dauthfamily.github.io/photo/c-1909-elizabeth-and-junior-dauth/

item.title: c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 143 – Photo Collage
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Dauth
item.description: The post c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 143 – Photo Collage appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
item.content:encoded:
c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 143 – Photo Collage
Top left photo shows Elizabeth Dauth, 2nd from left.; Middle left photo shows Elizabeth Dauth.; Middle center photo shows Elizabeth Dauth, 1920.; Bottom left photo shows June Dauth.

Transcription
"[Left to Right, Up to Down] Just "we"; Campers or Bachelors; Who?; 1920; 1920; Not feeling well or looking well; Tommy; Donnie"

People
Elizabeth Dauth (top left photo, 2nd from left) (middle left photo) (middle center photo)
George Dauth Jr. (bottom left photo)

Details
Date: 1920
Location: USA, Colorado, Greeley
Comments: This page is from "Elizabeth Dauth's Memory Book", a scrapbook put together by Elizabeth Dauth.
Source: Dauth Family Archive
Permalink: https://dauthfamily.github.io/document/c-1920-1924-elizabeth-dauths-memory-book-page-143-photo-collage/

The post c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 143 – Photo Collage appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.

item.title: c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 142 – Photo Collage
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Dauth
item.description: The post c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 142 – Photo Collage appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
item.content:encoded:
c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 142 – Photo Collage
Bottom left photo shows Elizabeth Dauth at Lettermans Picnic 1921, 2nd from right. Bottom right photo shows June Dauth bottom left, face barely visible by person in front.

Transcription
"[Left to Right, Up to Down] Ted - Pretty Boy; Some of the Bunch ahem?!; Ready to Start Lettermans Picnic; Martha and Ted were course a great excitement when they get started, look at the picture."

People
Elizabeth Dauth (bottom left photo, 2nd from right)
George Dauth Jr. (bottom right photo, bottom left behind)

Details
Date: 1921
Location: USA, Colorado, Greeley
Comments: This page is from "Elizabeth Dauth's Memory Book", a scrapbook put together by Elizabeth Dauth.
Source: Dauth Family Archive
Permalink: https://dauthfamily.github.io/document/c-1920-1924-elizabeth-dauths-memory-book-page-142-photo-collage/

The post c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 142 – Photo Collage appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.

item.title: c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 141 – Photo Collage
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Dauth
item.description: The post c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 141 – Photo Collage appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
item.content:encoded:
c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 141 – Photo Collage
Top photo shows Elizabeth Dauth with the B. B. Club c. 1921, 4th from left. Bottom left photo shows June Dauth facing away from the camera.

Transcription
"[Left to Right, Up to Down] Plate Salad 1921 B.B. Club; Pretty Boy; Martha; Letter Mens Picnic 1922; Lib; Beautiful Eyes Prague; Boo"

People
Elizabeth Dauth (top photo, 4th from left)
George Dauth Jr. (bottom left photo, right)

Details
Date: 1921
Location: USA, Colorado, Greeley
Comments: This page is from "Elizabeth Dauth's Memory Book", a scrapbook put together by Elizabeth Dauth.
Source: Dauth Family Archive
Permalink: https://dauthfamily.github.io/document/c-1920-1924-elizabeth-dauths-memory-book-page-141-photo-collage/

The post c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 141 – Photo Collage appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.

item.title: c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 95 – Sports Articles
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Dauth
item.description: The post c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 95 – Sports Articles appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
item.content:encoded:
c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 95 – Sports Articles
Article titled "Windsor Loses Tennis Matches" mentions Elizabeth Dauth winning a tennis match. Article titled "Wildcats in Collins Meet" mentions George Dauth, Junior is the captain of the track team.

People
Elizabeth Dauth
George Dauth Jr.

Details
Date: c. 1924
Location: USA, Colorado, Greeley
Comments: This page is from "Elizabeth Dauth's Memory Book", a scrapbook put together by Elizabeth Dauth.
Source: Dauth Family Archive
Permalink: https://dauthfamily.github.io/document/c-1920-1924-elizabeth-dauths-memory-book-page-95-sports-articles/

The post c. 1920-1924 – Elizabeth Dauth’s Memory Book – Page 95 – Sports Articles appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.

item.title: c. 1910s – George Dauth Family Children
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Dauth
item.description: The post c. 1910s – George Dauth Family Children appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
item.content:encoded:
c. 1910s – George Dauth Family Children
A rare group photo of George Dauth's children, which includes the adopted children of George's late brother Phillip Dauth, Elsie and Fred.

People
George Dauth Jr. (2nd from left)
Elizabeth Dauth (2nd from right)
Leslie Dauth (bicycle)
Elsie Dauth (left)
Fred Dauth (right)

Details
Date: c. 1910s
Location: USA, Colorado, Greeley
Comments: Elizabeth Dauth (2nd from right), Elsie Dauth (left), June Dauth , Leslie Dauth (bicycle), Fred Dauth(right)
Source: Dauth Family Archive
Permalink: https://dauthfamily.github.io/photo/c-1910s-george-dauth-family-children/

The post c. 1910s – George Dauth Family Children appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
